steps.title: Compare the two positions
steps.content: Text 1 doubts that genre categories are useful because they are ambiguous, subjective, and simplistic. Text 2 presents research that could improve automated genre classification.

steps.title: Predict Text 1's response
steps.content: Choice A discusses listener enjoyment, which Text 1 does not address; Choice C accepts genre recognition as the issue; Choice D supports progress in classification. Choice B reflects Text 1's skepticism about genre as a framework. The answer is B.
